bullets: State estimation (Kalman filtering) and machine learning for an intelligent Robotic Total Station.

org: ISIR - Institut des Systèmes Intelligents et de Robotique
bullets: Developed and deployed advanced control strategies for a haptic system at ISIR, focusing on high-fidelity tactile feedback. By integrating complex dynamic modeling and virtual coupling, I optimized the stability and precision of robotic grasping and manipulation.
